changes.description: Dashboard now tracks the active calendar event.
changes.details: Added a dashboard summary label for the currently available roster-wide calendar event. The label switches between Chaos Gate and Field Boss, uses the matching event icon, and shows remaining completions across eligible rosters.

changes.description: Dashboard summary includes daily task status.
changes.details: Daily progress is now shown alongside raids, weeklies, roster-wide events, and gold earners while preserving lazy daily behavior for rested Chaos Dungeon and Guardian Raid tracking.

changes.description: Update checks now wait before showing a fresh release.
changes.details: When a new version appears in the updater metadata, LOA Tracker now waits for a short release grace period before showing the update as installable. This gives GitHub Actions time to finish publishing the actual installer artifacts.

changes.description: Dashboard summary labels are cleaner and more compact.
changes.details: Raid, daily, weekly, roster-wide event, and gold earner labels now use a smaller modern layout, centered text, fixed maximum width, subtle dashboard-matching borders, and no hover effect for non-clickable elements.

changes.description: Dashboard task labels now show remaining work more clearly.
changes.details: Task labels now display open counts instead of raw X/Y values and switch to an all-done state when completed, so the dashboard reads more naturally at a glance.

changes.description: Roster sections and list view spacing were tightened.
changes.details: Roster titles were restyled with a simpler in-frame presentation. List view removes Chaos and Guardian progress bars, preserves raid labels longer on narrow widths, and lets character names shrink down before the layout wraps.

changes.description: Weekly gold progress now uses planned raid configuration.
changes.details: The maximum weekly gold value now comes from planned take-gold raid gates. Completed gold is calculated from completion status clears instead of gold logs, with mismatch/lost gold displayed separately as a greyed progress segment.

changes.description: Bound and tradable gold totals now use completion status.
changes.details: Bound and tradable weekly gold values are now derived from completed planned raid gates and their configured difficulties, keeping the gold card consistent with the main weekly progress calculation.

changes.description: Header reset countdown is easier to scan.
changes.details: The daily reset countdown now uses padded time parts such as 04H 09M or 04M and no longer displays seconds.

changes.description: Updater no longer exposes releases before installers are ready.
changes.details: The install command now also respects the release grace period, so an old visible button cannot start downloading a release while GitHub Actions is still preparing the installer.

changes.description: Dashboard gold no longer counts lost mismatch gold as earned.
changes.details: Difficulty mismatch gold is now shown separately and greyed out in the progress bar instead of being added to actual weekly income.

changes.description: Gold logs were removed from the active data flow.
changes.details: The old gold_logs table, repository, service, frontend initialization, and cleanup calls were removed. Existing users migrate forward by dropping the table during the next schema migration, while fresh installs no longer create it.

changes.description: Database schema version advanced for gold log cleanup.
changes.details: The database migration target was bumped so existing installations remove the obsolete gold_logs table safely during the next update.
